title: The Crackpack: Vanilla+
description: A modpack that adds new and exciting mechanics, while keeping the core feeling of Vanilla.
body:
Who doesn't love a good Vanilla Minecraft playthrough? I know I do! But sometimes, you want the feel of Minecraft Vanilla - with a few mods to enhance the experience! Well, your dreams have become a reality with The Crackpack: Vanilla+!

**VANILLA-STYLE MODS!**

The Crackpack: Vanilla+ comes packed with tons of mods that make the game feel fresh while still keeping the Vanilla feel you know and love.

**OVERHAULED OVERWORLD BIOMES AND STRUCTURES!**

Remember when you first played Minecraft and every structure made the world feel more alive? In this modpack, you can relive that feeling! Explore biomes and structures, new and old!

**AND MORE!**

The Crackpack: Vanilla+ has something for everyone, so come and enjoy a fun pack to play by yourself or with friends!
